# `/help` Command
Provides help/list of commands.

<table>
  <tr>
    <th>Aliases</th>
    <td>/?</td>
  </tr>
  <tr>
    <th>Permission Level</th>
    <td>Any</td>
  </tr>
  <tr>
    <th>Requires Cheats?</th>
    <td>No</td>
  </tr>
</table>

## Usage
### `/help [command: CommandName]`

### `/help <page: int>`

## Arguments
- `command`: CommandName
- `page`: int
